moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday with a blockbuster final between European champions Spain and South American and defending world champions Argentina.

angles.name: Final Excitement
angles.copy: It's all come down to this! Spain vs. Argentina in the World Cup Final this Sunday. Who are you backing to lift the trophy? 🏆

angles.name: Where to Watch
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just days away! Where will you be watching the World Cup Final on Sunday?

angles.name: History in the Making
angles.copy: History will be made this weekend! Will Spain claim their second title or will Messi lead Argentina to back-to-back victories in the 2026 World Cup?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, one of the UK's best-known multi-genre camping festivals, returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Latitude Festival kicks off next Thursday! Who's on your must-see list for music, comedy, or arts at Henham Park? 🏕️

angles.name: Beyond Music
angles.copy: More than just music! Latitude brings incredible comedy, theatre, and talks. What non-musical acts are you excited for next week?

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: It's almost time for the colourful chaos in Suffolk! Are your festival outfits ready for Latitude next week?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74

angles.name: Iconic Beats
angles.copy: The man behind the iconic beats of The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his birthday. A true drumming legend! 🥁

angles.name: Happy Birthday
angles.copy: From 'Roxanne' to 'Every Breath You Take', Stewart Copeland's distinctive drumming defined an era. Happy 74th Birthday!
